# Test Task: `endpoint / feature`

## Goal
Add tests for `<endpoint / feature>` to ensure correct behavior and edge case handling.

---

## Test Type
- [ ] Unit (logic / handler)
- [ ] E2E (full request flow)

---

## Done When
- All tests pass in CI or locally if pipeline testing not setup yet
- Core flows + edge cases covered
- No failing lint/tests
